nodes.identity_name: 啥玩意我没懂，混淆身份是啥

nodes.carried_fragment: i secretly work at papa john’s
Jealousy of a displaced and unrealised dream
Only pretended to be. Loves the post-apocalyptic world better than before. Found peace and purpose in the destruction. To not have anywhere felt right.
The secret keeper of her grandma’s vintage collection
he is rumoured to carry spinach in his pockets all the time.
A softness that hides more than it reveals
advice, warning, revelation, help, kindness, wrath, revenge
tag_labels: Other: Everything, everywhere, all at once.

nodes.carried_fragment: muscled hope and the memory of the Milky Way
Trans mission :- I am the ghost in the future past :- Trans mission ends
我在躲藏一种未知的危险，风在耳旁呼啸，景色逐渐变得模糊。我发了疯似的奔跑，尝试无视一切。
You are free, you can transform
